task:
Shotcut is already open with /home/user/Documents/multi_track.mlt (1920x1080, 30 fps). Three source files exist: /home/user/Videos/video1.mp4, /home/user/Videos/video2.mp4, and /home/user/Music/audio1.mp3.

Build a multi-track timeline as follows: place video1.mp4 on the default V1 video track, add a second video track (V2) and place video2.mp4 on it, and add a new audio track and place audio1.mp3 on it. Save the project so /home/user/Documents/multi_track.mlt keeps its 1920x1080 profile and references all three media files.

verification.description: video1.mp4 is referenced in the project
video2.mp4 is referenced in the project
audio1.mp3 is referenced in the project
